hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f || exit 0; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in *.go) gofmt -w "$f" ;; frontend/*.ts|frontend/*.tsx|frontend/*.css|frontend/*.json) npm --prefix frontend exec -- prettier --write "$f" ;; esac; }
